title: 72. The Drunk Woman[ ... words ]
content:
“Hmm? There’s someone here…”

The sudden female voice came out — not one of the men, not Rena.

It was barely understandable, but her speech was slurred to the limit.

“Hey, what do you guys think you’re doing? Three men gathered together…”

Rena could feel the woman’s voice growing closer. She didn’t know who it was. It seemed familiar, yet also unfamiliar.

At any rate, it was an unexpected turn of events for the men. Their hands froze instantly, and all eyes turned to the intruder.

“What is it? A drunk?”

“Tch… Just when I was about to finish… Big sister, there’s nothing here for you.”

“What? You have your brothers, don’t you? And there’s still one more man. What were you doing here? I could teach you something, you know~”

“I don’t need teaching. You should just go home.”

“Why? I’m not good enough for you? Listen, I’m amazing too!”

With those words, the woman proudly thrust her two massive breasts toward the men and shook them heavily up and down.

Her swaying breasts unmistakably stimulated the men’s crotches.

But the man standing in front of her reeked of alcohol so strongly that he had to pinch his nose.

“Wow, that’s great… but I have plans tonight. Rain check?”

“Eeeeh~! I’m much better than that girl~!”

After shaking her chest, the woman started swinging her hips left and right, openly inviting the men.

Normally she would have already reached out, but since a perfectly prepared woman was waiting behind her, the men decided it wasn’t worth wasting time on this drunk.

One man grabbed the newcomer’s shoulder and spun her around 180 degrees.

“Go have fun with some wine instead, big sister.”

Just as the man tried to shove the intruder away, he noticed the woman he had been holding was suddenly grabbed from behind.

“Hey, what about the other girl?”

The man holding the drunk turned around and saw the woman gripping Rena’s arm approaching him.

“H-hey! What are you doing!”

“Leave her alone. She doesn’t even have the strength to stand up anymore. You can handle that one instead, right?”

A thought he had briefly had earlier came back to him.

It would be good to take care of the prepared woman, but the one he was about to release was a super high-class beauty. Her breasts were huge even through her clothes, and the alcohol scent clung to her. Yet from her hair came a fragrant scent that stirred the male heart. On top of that, because she was drunk, she herself wanted to be taken, and as long as the men were satisfied, she would do it unconditionally.

A perfect woman had fallen into their laps.

The hand gripping the woman’s shoulder tightened.

I must never let go of this toy.

“As you wish! I’ll fuck you until you break!”

With a cute, pleading voice, the woman was roughly slammed against the wall by the man.

Her breasts were pulled out without care, and her crotch was stimulated in a careless manner.

“Ooh! Just as I thought, she’s amazing…”

“Aaaan♡ Good, that’s good♡”

Even though she was being freely used by two men, the woman was completely feeling it. In fact, the rough caresses that seemed driven by pure lust made her moans even louder.

It wasn’t about technique — it was whatever they wanted, inside their own hands, the supreme woman was writhing in ecstasy. This scene drove the men’ lust even higher.

“Hey, let me join too.”

“You handle the brat over there.”

The men who had been interested in Rena were now completely uninterested in her.

Rather than tormenting her to make her react, they much preferred the guys around twenty who would just moan “ah ah” after being toyed with lightly.

“N-no… You guys have to take care of the other man too!”

The words that somehow slipped out during the caresses sounded both seductive and passionate, instantly igniting the last man’s lust.

“…No way. I’m joining too. Hey, let me grope them!”

Finally, all three men began to enjoy the intruder’s body.

Rena watched the scene with dazed eyes. The women’ faces that occasionally peeked through the men’ bodies were beautiful, and she didn’t look like someone who would want such a thing.

Perhaps the woman hadn’t had the intention to help Rena, but she had still been helped.

While thinking she would one day repay this kindness, Rena quietly closed her eyes.

“Hey, turn your ass this way.”

Rena’s arm was still being held. The woman was now forced into a position with her back and butt facing a man.

“Hold it right there!”

“Haaaah♡! My… my big thing is moving inside me♡♡”

Her arms were pinned, yet the woman was pressing her body forward. Her crotch was already soaked with love juices, and she kept moaning without pause.

“Such huge breasts shaking like that… you’re too lewd.”

“For girls like you, I’ll pour plenty of white milk all over you.”

The remaining men took out their cocks and began stroking themselves in front of the woman being taken from behind.

“…Remember what you did! Repent!”

A loud slap rang out as the man struck the woman’s ass. Her butt turned slightly red, and she moaned again.

“It hurts aah♡! Even though it hurts, every time I’m thrust into, pleasure overwhelms me! It still hurts──nnn!?”

While speaking, one man in front shoved his cock into the woman’s mouth and pistoned with all his strength.

“Ahh, damn… It feels too good. What the hell is this!”

Lewd sounds echoed through the alley. The wet squelching of love juices dripping to the ground was so loud that no one could hear anything else.

“…I’m cumming soon.”

Two men groaned as they reached their limits while enjoying the woman’s body.

But the men’ movements didn’t stop.

“Gngh… Gbuoooh… Daaaaan…”

The woman tried to speak, but the cock repeatedly stabbing her silenced her. Of course the men understood what she wanted to say. Even so, they cut her off and pretended not to hear.

“Gonna cum inside! Remember what you did!”

“I’m cumming all over your body!”

The men sped up their pistons for the final spurt. The rhythm of “Guchogucho, paan-paan, shukoshuko” played out as the men finally released their hot loads.

“Aaaahhh! Aaaaah──”

After emptying themselves completely, the men’ strength left their bodies. The instant they did, the woman slipped out of their grasp, swiftly delivered a karate chop to the back of each man’s neck, and knocked them all unconscious.

“Cum inside? That’s too much. Tch…”

Slipping past the fallen men, the woman walked over to the slumped Rena, picked her up, and spoke.

“You belong to me now.”

Carrying Rena in her arms, the woman walked calmly into the night darkness.

72. The Drunk Woman
